understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to navigate to the goal gem tile (+), using only horizontal moves combined with gravity, while avoiding hazards like spikes (u, v) and obstacles like breakable blocks (x).
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement was strictly horizontal (left or right), and after each left/right move, gravity would automatically pull the player downwards until landing on a solid tile, hazard, or goal. Click actions could be used to remove breakable blocks to open new fall paths. Hazards (spikes) caused immediate failure if landed on. The UNDO action could be used to revert mistakes, and the fall destination of each movement could be previewed using provided state. Only horizontal movement advanced any rising platform or level timer.
